schema_json.description: An expert answer grounded in search results.

schema_json.title: StormAnswer

prompt:
You are a research expert being interviewed about:
RESEARCH QUESTION: What are the proven health benefits and risks of intermittent fasting in adults with metabolic syndrome?

The interviewer (Rajiv Menon, MBA, Industry perspective) asks:
QUESTION: What do real-world usage, retention, and adherence data from commercial intermittent-fasting tracking apps (Zero, Fastic, Simple, LIFE Fasting Tracker, DoFasting, Window, Lasta) tell us about how the RCT literature generalizes to unsupervised self-paying consumers — specifically: day-30 and day-90 retention, drop-off curves by protocol (16:8 TRE vs 5:2 vs ADF), user-reported weight-loss outcomes, subscription churn signals after the AHA 2024 cardiovascular mortality news cycle, and any publicly disclosed app user-base outcome data from company press releases, investor decks, or academic partnerships?

SEARCH RESULTS (your ONLY source of information):
[Source 1] Retention, Fasting Patterns, and Weight Loss With an Intermittent ...
  URL: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC9579929/
  Content: This study aimed to quantify user retention, fasting patterns, and weight loss by users of 2 IF mobile apps.
[Source 2] Zero: Intermittent Fasting - App Store - Apple
  URL: https://apps.apple.com/sk/app/zero-intermittent-fasting/id1168348542
  Content: Zero is the all-in-one fasting tracker and nutrition app built for real results. Most fasting and weight loss apps stop at simply tracking fasts or calories.
[Source 3] Zero - Intermittent Fasting - Apps on Google Play
  URL: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.zerofasting.zero&hl=en_US
  Content: Zero is the world's most popular intermittent fasting app. As seen in Women's Health, Fortune, Men's Health, The Joe Rogan Experience and more.
[Source 4] (PDF) Retention, Fasting Patterns, and Weight Loss With an ...
  URL: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/362290711_Retention_Fasting_Patterns_and_Weight_Loss_With_an_Intermittent_Fasting_App_A_Large-scale_52-week_Observational_Study_Preprint
  Content: By week 26, users lost over 1% of their starting weight per EFH per day on average. The regression analysis using all variables was highly ...
[Source 5] Review of Elon Musk's intermittent fasting app Zero | Fortune
  URL: https://fortune.com/well/2022/10/04/i-tried-the-intermittent-fasting-app-elon-musk-used-to-lose-20-pounds-to-see-if-its-worth-the-hefty-price-tag/
  Content: "I found the app to be a helpful way to self-regulate, stay on track after a period of indulgence, and monitor progress."
[Source 6] The effectiveness of mobile app usage in facilitating weight loss - PMC
  URL: https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11091450/
  Content: This study demonstrates the effectiveness of engaging with the SIMPLE mobile application in achieving WL in adults with overweight and obesity in a real‐world ...
[Source 7] How the Zero app can help with Intermittent Fasting | by Dr. Miss
  URL: https://lorichappellmann.medium.com/how-the-zero-app-can-help-with-intermittent-fasting-19eaf2d8551d
  Content: Zero is designed to support healthy fasting by tracking intermittent, circadian, and custom fasting options.
[Source 8] Is Intermittent Fasting App FatBurner Really Better Than Zero For ...
  URL: https://www.alibaba.com/product-insights/is-intermittent-fasting-app-fatburner-really-better-than-zero-for-long-term-adherence-and-results.html
  Content: Zero's 30-day retention is slightly lower at 57%, yet holds at 39% at 180 days. The divergence isn't random: FatBurner's peak churn coincides ...
[Source 9] Is Zero the best IF app? : r/intermittentfasting - Reddit
  URL: https://www.reddit.com/r/intermittentfasting/comments/1dv11is/is_zero_the_best_if_app/
  Content: Is Zero really the best app for intermittent fasting on Android? I really enjoyed the explanation of each fasting stage they had, it motivated me a lot.
[Source 10] Your First 3 Months with Zero: What to Expect
  URL: https://zerolongevity.com/blog/your-first-3-months-with-zero-what-to-expect/
  Content: After 3 Months with Zero, you'll have lost more weight (particularly fat!) and improved numerous markers of metabolic health.
[Source 11] Lose weight with Fastic - Intermittent Fasting & Food Tracker App
  URL: https://fastic.com/en
  Content: With the Fastic free intermittent fasting app, millions of people have achieved their desired weight, overcome disease and regained their quality of life. Take ...
[Source 12] Fastic Weight Loss & Fasting - Apps on Google Play
  URL: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.fastic.app&hl=en_US
  Content: Unlock your weight loss journey with Fastic, the app that tailors fasting and nutrition to fit YOUR lifestyle and goals. Achieve your weight goal naturally and ...
[Source 13] Fastic Weight Loss & Fasting - App Store
  URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/fastic-weight-loss-fasting/id1459260306
  Content: Unlock your weight loss journey with Fastic, the app that tailors fasting and nutrition to fit YOUR lifestyle and goals. Dive into a personalized health ...
[Source 14] Fastic Weight Loss & Fasting - App Store - Apple
  URL: https://apps.apple.com/ai/app/fastic-weight-loss-fasting/id1459260306
  Content: Unlock your weight loss journey with Fastic, the app that tailors fasting and nutrition to fit YOUR lifestyle and goals. Dive into a personalized health ...
[Source 15] We Tested the Simple App to See How It Helps With Intermittent ...
  URL: https://www.everydayhealth.com/diet-nutrition/simple-life-app-review/
  Content: The Simple app is an intermittent fasting and weight loss app designed to help users understand their habits and teach them how to build healthier ones.

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Provide a comprehensive, well-structured answer (200-400 words).
2. ONLY use information from the search results above. Do NOT add information not present in the sources.
3. When citing specific facts, mention which source they come from.
4. Extract 3-5 key findings as bullet points.
5. List the URLs of sources you actually used in your answer.
6. If the search results do not adequately answer the question, say so explicitly and note what information is missing.

Return a JSON object with 'answer', 'key_findings', and 'sources_used' fields.
